_comment: https://github.com/rolldown/rolldown/issues/9806 - with experimental.lazyBarrel, a sideEffects:false barrel has an own derived statement `const Bar = Foo.Bar;` reading a property off a default-imported CJS submodule. The entry imports only an unrelated re-export (`Other`), so the barrel-owned `Foo.Bar` statement must not survive without the `Foo` import it reads. Executes to assert the bundle runs and Other === 'other-value'.
